productDisplayName: Nike Women Air Relentless Grey Sports Shoes
description: Designed for absolute comfort, the nike Air Relentless running shoe is absolutely stylish and versatile for those looking for a comfortable run. It's stylish look doubles it up as a great lifestyle footwear.UpperHeavily meshed upper for breatheability with synthetic overlays for enhanced durabilityLacing system for a snug, customised FitMeshed and padded tongue and collar for maximum comfortMidsolePhylon midsole for absolute impact protection and lightweight comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with flex grooves for ease of movementWaffle-pattern lugs for grip and excellent tractionScooped heel for extra cushioning and comfortshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
